metadata.title: Build a Three-Pass Verification Checklist with Codex
_variant_todo: rewrite every beat narration_text in the Teardown register (voices/teardown/VOICE.md + CLAUDE-BRAND.md) — voice only, facts unchanged
signature tangent 0-1 per video, ONLY on a clear opportunity (see SKILL)
swap the outro to the Claude outro from AUTHOR.MD :: NikBearBrown
then build audience-namespaced (audio in the new voice, scenes in the new palette)

skin_warnings: NO RENDERABLE BEATS: no beat carries a shot.remotion.pattern or Manim annotation — the pipeline will render NOTHING and every slot becomes a YOU-slate. The sheet was authored without the scene contract.
B00: palette=claude but the cold open is 'un-annotated' — COLD OPEN LAW wants ClaudeComposerAsk
B09: palette=claude but the outro is 'un-annotated' — OUTRO LAW wants ClaudeTitleOutro

beats.narration_text: This is Liam, in for Bear. Most builds stop at Pass 1. The failures Pass 1 misses are the ones that surface six days later.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: This is Liam, in for Bear. Most builds stop at Pass 1. The failures Pass 1 misses are the ones that surface six days later.

beats.narration_text: Pass 1 — functional verification — answers 'does it run?' Pass 2 — edge-case verification — answers 'does it handle the scope's boundary conditions?' Pass 3 — spec-needs verification — answers 'does it satisfy each user need, tested in the way users actually encounter it?' The failures Pass 3 catches are invisible to automated tests.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Pass 1 — functional verification — answers 'does it run?' Pass 2 — edge-case verification — answers 'does it handle the scope's boundary conditions?' Pass 3 — s

beats.narration_text: claude "Generate a three-pass verification checklist from this spec. Pass 1: functional tests. Pass 2: edge cases for each boundary condition. Pass 3: user needs — for each user need, write a specific verification step naming the tool, viewport, or measure to use. Flag Pass 3 manual items vs. automatable ones." < spec.md

props.command: claude "Generate a three-pass verification checklist. Pass 1: functional. Pass 2: edge cases. Pass 3: user needs with specific verification steps. Flag manual vs automatable." < spec.md

build.suggested: suggested prompt: claude "Generate a three-pass verification checklist from this spec. Pass 1: functional tests. Pass 2: edge cases for each boundary condition. Pass 3: user need

beats.narration_text: three_pass_checker.py — generates checklist from spec, Pass 1, 2, and 3 structured separately, manual vs. automatable flagged, defects-remaining counter per pass.

props.code:
# generates three-pass verification checklist from spec
import checklist_engine

spec = open('spec.md').read()
checklist = checklist_engine.generate(spec)
for p in [1, 2, 3]:
    items = checklist.pass_items(p)
    print(f'Pass {p}: {len(items)} items ({checklist.manual(p)} manual, {checklist.auto(p)} auto)')
    for item in items:
        print(f'  [{"M" if item.manual else "A"}] {item.description}')

build.suggested: suggested prompt: three_pass_checker.py — generates checklist from spec, Pass 1, 2, and 3 structured separately, manual vs. automatable flagged, defects-remaining counter per pas

beats.narration_text: 18-item checklist: Pass 1 — 6 items, all automatable. Pass 2 — 7 items, 5 automatable, 2 manual. Pass 3 — 5 items, 1 automatable, 4 manual. Manual Pass 3 items: open on iPhone-preset Chrome devtools portrait, confirm no horizontal scroll; render at 120% browser zoom, confirm no text truncation; measure load time on throttled 3G, confirm under 3 seconds. These don't run in pytest.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: 18-item checklist: Pass 1 — 6 items, all automatable. Pass 2 — 7 items, 5 automatable, 2 manual. Pass 3 — 5 items, 1 automatable, 4 manual. Manual Pass 3 items:

beats.narration_text: Show a Pass 3 failure — phone-readability table — that passes Pass 1 and Pass 2.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Show a Pass 3 failure — phone-readability table — that passes Pass 1 and Pass 2.

beats.narration_text: Table passes all 6 Pass 1 tests and all 7 Pass 2 tests. Fails Pass 3 item 1: on iPhone-preset portrait, the 6-column table requires horizontal scroll. No automated test would have caught this — it requires the specific viewport. The failure goes into AGENTS.md lessons: tables with more than 4 columns need responsive collapse for mobile.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Table passes all 6 Pass 1 tests and all 7 Pass 2 tests. Fails Pass 3 item 1: on iPhone-preset portrait, the 6-column table requires horizontal scroll. No automa

beats.narration_text: The three passes aren't redundant — they catch categorically different failures. Pass 1 verifies correctness. Pass 2 verifies robustness. Pass 3 verifies usefulness. A build that clears all three is genuinely ready. A build that only clears Pass 1 has two categories of failures still waiting to be discovered in production.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: The three passes aren't redundant — they catch categorically different failures. Pass 1 verifies correctness. Pass 2 verifies robustness. Pass 3 verifies useful

beats.narration_text: Next: capture what you learned from the build before you move on.
